ab: karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za paisu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ai mu! maranger u kivulas za manueman paisu?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: malalup ku murung za paisu, karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za paisu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ’azi ku miinurung za paisu.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: malalup ku murung za paisu, karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za paisu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: inaku, nanu kinivulas a pakangaway mu, ’azi u ziya pareveliyas kaninku.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za kavang?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za kiping?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ai, elak inu.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: karuwa ku kivulas kaninu za valray?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku pavulasanay lra kani ’Arevuwan.
en: B: I lent it to 'Arevuwan.

ab: pavulasay ku kananu zidēnsiya maw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ai, mawmu, pareveliyasu kaninku nu ’emanan.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: ’ema’udalr lra, ’azi ku maysuku, pavulasay ku kananu suku maw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: mawmau saya ku suku, ta pisukuwaw i inta zazuwa.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: i ini na valray mu, ninu ipavulas a pakangaway, ku pareveliyasaw kaninu.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: rengayu ku lra nu maranger u ziya mena’u za eman valrayan.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: parevelaliyas ku kaninu kana paisu nu aidan?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: kakuda, nu ulra nu paisu pakalrazamaw ku lra.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: parevelaliyas u kaninku kana paisu nu aidan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ku nu pareveliyasaw nu ’emanan.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: parevelaliyas u kaninku kana valray nu aidan?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ku pareveliyasaw lra kaninu na valray a daman, amelri ziyamaw?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: tu ipavulas ni Asaw kaninu ini na impis?
en: A: Did Asaw lend you this pen?

ab: ai, kivulas ku kantaw harem kana wari.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: nu kinivulas kani Asaw ini na impis?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Asaw?

ab: amelri, tu trinima’an ni inani.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: iniyan lra za iyam, uwa kivulas kani Sunay za saema za iyam.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Sunay.

ab: uniyan lra za iyam, uwa kivulas kani Sunay za saema za iyam.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Sunay.

ab: ai, kay ku kivulasa.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: pareveliyasu na paisu kaninku kuwayu i Senayan.
en: B: Go tell Senayan to give me my money back.

ab: mivaverayan kaninu za manueman paisu intaw ziyamaw?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
